---
title: "Education"
---

## Professional Science Master in Ecosystem Science & Sustainability

**Colorado State University (Remote)** *Expected December 2026*

-   Relevant coursework:
    -   Environmental Data Science Applications
    -   Life Cycle Assessment for Sustainability
    -   GIS & Data Analysis in Water Resources
    -   Analysis of Environmental Impact (NEPA)
    -   Modeling Watershed Hydrology
    -   Water Law

## Master of Science in Biology

**Austin Peay State University - Clarksville, TN** *May 2022*

-   Relevant coursework:
    -   Algal Ecology
    -   Ichthyology

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Bachelor of Science in Biology

**Eastern Michigan University - Ypsilanti, MI** *April 2020*

-   Concentration: Ecology, Organismal Diversity, & Evolution
-   Minor: Zoology
-   Relevant coursework:
    -   Conservation Biology
    -   Behavioral Ecology
    -   Marine Biology

------------------------------------------------------------------------
